item.title: How does a digital sundial work?
item.description: In this video I show you how the first digital sundial works. I talk about sundials and how they can change in accuracy and become off by hours over millions of years due to the slowing rotation of the earth.

media:content.media:title: How does a digital sundial work?
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you how the first digital sundial works. I talk about sundials and how they can change in accuracy and become off by hours over millions of years due to the slowing rotation of the earth.

item.title: Is the wobbly table theorem ever wrong?
item.description: The wobbly table theorem generally holds true for four-legged tables with equal leg lengths on continuous uneven surfaces, as rotating the table often less will find a spot where all four legs touch the ground. It works by swapping the two legs in contact with the ground with the two that are hovering.

media:content.media:title: Is the wobbly table theorem ever wrong?
media:content.media:description: The wobbly table theorem generally holds true for four-legged tables with equal leg lengths on continuous uneven surfaces, as rotating the table often less will find a spot where all four legs touch the ground. It works by swapping the two legs in contact with the ground with the two that are hovering.

item.title: Sodium pancakes
item.description: I make a sodium pancake in my hydraulic press

media:content.media:title: Sodium pancakes
media:content.media:description: I make a sodium pancake in my hydraulic press

item.title: Is apple juice bad for you?
item.description: In this video I test if drinking apple juice has enough amygdalin in it to actually harm you due to the cyanide in the seeds. I use a cyanide test kit to see if there are enough seeds in apple juice to actually cause harm.

media:content.media:title: Is apple juice bad for you?
media:content.media:description: In this video I test if drinking apple juice has enough amygdalin in it to actually harm you due to the cyanide in the seeds. I use a cyanide test kit to see if there are enough seeds in apple juice to actually cause harm.

item.title: Is an electric engine a good idea?
item.description: I show you an electric V8 engine vs a gas powered V8 engine. I talk about how an electric V8 engine may not be the best idea for an electric engine

media:content.media:title: Is an electric engine a good idea?
media:content.media:description: I show you an electric V8 engine vs a gas powered V8 engine. I talk about how an electric V8 engine may not be the best idea for an electric engine

item.description: I show you how I made ghost smoke

item.title: Heat pipe steak
item.description: Can you cook food with heat pipes?

media:content.media:title: Heat pipe steak
media:content.media:description: Can you cook food with heat pipes?

item.title: How does facial recognition work?
item.description: In this video I show you how to make 3d images using the the VSCEL lasers. I show you how you can see these IR lasers using a security camera. I talk about how the lasers can be so small.

media:content.media:title: How does facial recognition work?
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you how to make 3d images using the the VSCEL lasers. I show you how you can see these IR lasers using a security camera. I talk about how the lasers can be so small.

item.title: These particles flow upstream instead of down
item.description: Is it possible to for things to flow against the current of water on their own? In this video I talk about upstream contamination and talk about the mechanism behind how particles can actually flow upstream against the flow of water on their own.

media:content.media:title: These particles flow upstream instead of down
media:content.media:description: Is it possible to for things to flow against the current of water on their own? In this video I talk about upstream contamination and talk about the mechanism behind how particles can actually flow upstream against the flow of water on their own.

item.title: Exposing the dark truth about chips!
item.description: In this video I put potato chip bags (Lays, Doritos, Fritos) in my vacuum chamber to show you how much empty space there actually is in potato chip bags. First I put the chips in the vacuum chamber and let the bags explode. But then I show a cool trick where I poke a hole in the bag and then slowly let the vacuum suck out all the air from the bag. Then when I let the air back in the atmosphere crushes the potato chip bags in the vacuum chamber!

media:content.media:title: Exposing the dark truth about chips!
media:content.media:description: In this video I put potato chip bags (Lays, Doritos, Fritos) in my vacuum chamber to show you how much empty space there actually is in potato chip bags. First I put the chips in the vacuum chamber and let the bags explode. But then I show a cool trick where I poke a hole in the bag and then slowly let the vacuum suck out all the air from the bag. Then when I let the air back in the atmosphere crushes the potato chip bags in the vacuum chamber!
